references.passiveText: There are others who've risen against corrupt leaders. A network of free settlements is quietly forming.
references.triggerDialogue: {target_npc} in {location} organized their own revolt last season and succeeded. They've been quietly reaching out to other settlements suffering under bad leadership, offering advice, supplies, and solidarity. If the free settlements can coordinate, they'll be too strong for any single tyrant to crush.

references.passiveText: There's an old weapons cache hidden somewhere in the hills, left over from a previous uprising.
references.triggerDialogue: Decades ago, another group tried to resist an oppressive garrison and hid their weapons {location_hint} when the resistance collapsed. {target_npc} found a partial map in an old diary. If those weapons are still there and still usable, they could arm every willing person in {location}. The question is whether whoever finds them first will use them for liberation or just more oppression.
